# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
$db = new PDO('mysql:host=localhost;dbname=company', 'root', '');
?>

<?php
	if (isset($_POST['status']) && isset($_POST['category'])){
		// $status=$_POST['status'];
		// $category=$_POST['category'];
		$status = $_POST['status'];
		$category = $_POST['category'];

		$sql1 = "SELECT COUNT(status) as total_status, status FROM tbl_task WHERE category = :category AND status=:status";
		$statement1=$db->prepare($sql1);
		// $statement1->bindParam(':status', $status);
		// $statement1->bindValue(':category', $category);
		$statement1->execute();
		while ($row2 = $statement1->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC)) {
			echo "<br>";
			print_r($row2);
			echo "Total Status ".$status." is ".$row2['total_status'];
			// $status1=$row2['status'];
		}
	}

	elseif (isset($_POST['status'])){

		$sql = "SELECT COUNT(status) as total, status FROM tbl_task WHERE category=:category AND status=:status";
		$statement=$db->prepare($sql);
		// $statement->bindParam(':status', $status);
		$statement->execute();
		while ($row1 = $statement->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC)) {
			echo "<br>";
			print_r($row1);
			echo "Total Status ".$status." is ".$row1['total'];
			// $status=$row2['status'];
		}
	}

	elseif (isset($_POST['category'])){

		$sql = "SELECT COUNT(category) as total, category FROM tbl_task WHERE status=:status AND category=:category";
		$statement=$db->prepare($sql);
		// $statement->bindParam(':status', $status);
		$statement->execute();
		while ($row1 = $statement->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC)) {
			echo "<br>";
			print_r($row1);
			echo "Total Category ".$category." is ".$row1['total'];
			// $status=$row2['status'];
		}
	}

	else{

		$sql = "SELECT COUNT(category) as total, category FROM tbl_task";
		$statement=$db->prepare($sql);
		$statement->execute();
		while ($row1 = $statement->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC)) {
			echo "<br>";
			print_r($row1);
			echo "Total Category ".$category." is ".$row1['total'];
			// $status=$row2['status'];
		}
	}

	?>
